title: gladiolus rehmannii
intro: Gladiolus rehmannii, also known as the red corn lily or Rehmann's gladiolus, is a flowering plant species within the lily family. It is native to South Africa and is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus rehmannii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus rehmannii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
